title: CURVER Style Rattan Effect Kitchen, Living room, Bathroom, Bedroom, Utility Small Rectangular Storage Basket 6 Litres - Light Grey
features: Elegant storage solution – Perfect for bathroom, kitchen, living room, office, or study areas to keep your space neat and organised
Traditional flat rattan effect design – Stylish woven texture that is stackable for easy storage when not in use
Compact 6 litre capacity – Ideal size for storing small items, helping to reduce clutter in any room
Durable, lightweight, and easy to clean – Made from sturdy materials with a wipe-clean surface for simple maintenance
Compact external dimensions – Measures 29 x 19 x 13 cm (L x W x H), designed to fit easily in cupboards or shelves
description: From the manufacturer Curver Style Small Rectangular Storage Basket Grey 6 Litre The Style small rectangular 6 litre basket is multi functional and can be used for neatly storing all of those bits and pieces such as perfumes, nail polishes or toiletries. Whether it's keeping all bathroom accessories together or being used in your office to keep stationery items tidy and easily accessible, this versatile basket is the ideal storage solution. Made from durable resin, this basket is easy to clean and will stay looking good for years. Main Features Elegant Rattan Effect Style Easy To Handle Multi Purpose Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
